title: LR-201
author: Revelation 5:12;1-6
snippet: How worthy is the Lamb who was slain, to receive power and divinity, and wisdom and strength and honor. To him belong glory and power for ever and ever.

title: Ps 121:1-2, 3-4ab, 4cd-5
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: Let us go rejoicing to the house of the Lord.

title: Mk 11:9, 10
author: SP2025
snippet: Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord! Blessed is the kingdom of our father David that is to come!

author: Ken Canedo
snippet: Jesus Christ is Lord! Jesus Christ is Lord
title: Jesus Christ Is Lord
LR-202
author: Ps 29 (28): 10-11
snippet: The Lord sits as King for ever. The Lord will bless his people with peace.

title: O Come to the Altar
author: Christopher Brown, Steven Furtick, Wade Joye, and Mack Brock. Vocal arr. by Scott Soper
snippet: O come to the altar, the Father's arms are open wide. Forgiveness was bought with the, Precious blood of Jesus Christ.

title: Goodness Of God
author: Bethel Music & Jenn Johnson
snippet: I love you, Lord for your mercy never fails me. All my days, I’ve been held in your hands. From the moment that I wake up until I lay my head; Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God

title: Awesome God
author: Rich Mullins
snippet: Our God is an awesome God He reigns from Heaven above with wisdom, power, and love. Our God is an awesome God.

author: Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
